Class SolverPropertiesLoader

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.solvertypes.SolverPropertiesLoader
public class SolverPropertiesLoader extends Object

This class provides SolverType instances based on the current SMT solver definitions in various configuration files.

The configuration are in loaded from

  1. The current working directory: ./smt-solvers.json
  2. Path from system property : -P key.smt_solvers=<path>
  3. The KeY user configuration folder: ~/.key/smt-solvers.json
  4. All resources with the name de/uka/ilkd/key/smt/solvertypes/solvers.key.json in the classpath.

Local configuration overwrites user configuration overwrites classpath configuration. All configuration is overwritten using the ProofIndependentSettings.getSMTSettings().

Use (1) and (2) rather to add new SMT solvers to KeY.

    Field
    Description
    static final String
    PACKAGE_PATH
    Package path of the solvers.txt file.
    static final String

    static final String
    SYSTEM_PROPERTY_KEY_SMT_SOLVERS
    Java system property key denoting a path for further definitions of SMT solvers.

    • SolverPropertiesLoader

      public SolverPropertiesLoader()

  • Method Details

    • getSolvers

      public Collection<SolverType> getSolvers()
      Initializes SOLVERS using the given hardcoded properties if that list is empty, otherwise just returns the existing list. The solver type names are unique across the returned list. Note that care may have to be taken for the names to be globally unique (see SolverTypes).
      Returns:
      a copy of the created list of solver types

    • getExperimentalSolvers

      public Collection<SolverType> getExperimentalSolvers()
      Returns:
      a copy of the created list of experimental solvers

    • getLocalSmtSolverPath

      public static Path getLocalSmtSolverPath()
      Path for local smt solver definitions. Precedence over user and classpath smt solver configs.

    • getUserSmtSolverPath

      public static Path getUserSmtSolverPath()
      Path for user-wide smt solver definitions. Precedence over classpath smt solver configs, overwritten by local configs.

    • getSystemPropertySmtSolverPath

      public static @Nullable Path getSystemPropertySmtSolverPath()
      Path for smt solver definitions given per Java system properties.
